title: FLUX.2 [max] - Top-Tier Quality Image Generation | Black Forest Labs
text:
FLUX.2
[max]
Top-tier quality image generation and editing. The most capable variant of FLUX.2 for professional-grade output.
Try in Playground
Access via API
Compare FLUX.2 models
Consistent Product Photos
Unmatched Quality
FLUX.2 [max] delivers the highest quality output in the FLUX.2 family. See for yourself.
Product Marketing
Iterative Editing
Logo Design
Create highest-quality, marketplace-ready product photos that look polished, consistent, and professional - perfect for showcasing your products.
Grounded Generations
Cinematic Visuals
Styles
FLUX.2 [max] Generate and Edit images with grounded with real-time information. Visualize trending products, current events, or the latest styles without manually sourcing reference material.
“
Present a clear, 45° top-down isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene of Freiburg, Germany, featuring its most iconic landmarks and architectural elements. Use soft, refined textures with realistic PBR materials and gentle, lifelike lighting and shadows. Integrate the current weather conditions directly into the city environment to create an immersive atmospheric mood.
Use a clean, minimalistic composition with a soft, solid-colored background.

At the top-center, place the title “Freiburg” in large bold text, a prominent weather icon beneath it, then the date (small text) and temperature (medium text). All text must be centered with consistent spacing, and may subtly overlap the tops of the buildings.
”
Character Consistency
Spatial Reasoning
Text Rendering
Create and edit characters with unmatched consistency across images, scenes, and styles. FLUX.2 [max] preserves facial features, proportions, expressions, and visual identity. Even across complex edits, multiple references, and changing environments.
References
References
Retexturing
Filmmaking
Redesign surfaces and materials with precision and control. FLUX.2 [max] enables consistent, high-quality retexturing of objects, products, and environments while preserving shape, geometry, and lighting.
References
References
Compare FLUX.2 models
Choose the right model for quality, speed, and control.
At a glance
FLUX.2 [max]
Maximum performance: Highest editing consistency across tasks. Strongest prompt following and faithful representation of various styles. Supports grounded generation with real-time web context.
FLUX.2 [pro]
Top performance at affordable price: The high quality, production-grade image editing and generation model.
FLUX.2 [flex]
Specialized models for typography and keeping small details.
FLUX.2 [klein]
Fast and efficient: Optimized for rapid iteration and prototyping with excellent speed-to-quality ratio.
